name: sulis-execution
description: Work Package Executor — three-layer architecture (per v0.9.0) plus plan-mode-style Step 1.5 plan generation (v0.10.0+). (1) deterministic CLI tool library (wpx-* scripts) handles all bookkeeping including the new wpx-journal seed-plan / mark-plan-item / add-plan-item subcommands; (2) executor agent owns Steps 1-7 (worktree → Step 1.5 plan generation → Red-Green-Blue → docs → lint → commit → push) and delegates bookkeeping to wpx-* tools; (3) calling session owns Steps 8-12 via wpx-pipeline background Bash, security-reviewer Agent spawn, and wpx-step12 atomic wrap. v0.10.3 closes the auto-draft INDEX-registration gap: new wpx-index add-wp (idempotent insert, --from-wp-file reads frontmatter) and wpx-index sync-auto-drafts (one-shot recovery; scans work-packages/ for orphaned WP-AUTO-*.md files and backfills missing INDEX rows). Step 11 calling-session prompts now call add-wp after wpx-findings auto-draft-wp, so every new auto-draft WP appears in INDEX with status=auto-draft (concierge promotes to pending after founder review). v0.10.2 fixed three correctness bugs in wpx-step12's sub-tool dispatcher (multi-line JSON parse, ok:false propagation, --repo-root propagation). v0.10.1 fixed the wpx-* tool discoverability gap (path-resolution preamble + wpx human wrapper). Self-heals in-scope failures via OODA + Five Whys per executor-loop-standard.md; escalates out-of-scope failures via structured BLOCKER records. Follows git-workflow-standard.md. Composes with CP-01..CP-05, AAF-01..AAF-09, EP-02/03/07, RGB-01..03.
